raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Start here","name":"What feels most worth talking through today?","description":"A calm opener that lets Elena set the agenda before any concern is introduced.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"landing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Reorg impact","name":"What has changed most in your day-to-day since the reorg?","description":"Surfaces the concrete shift in work texture without assuming the change is negative.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Leadership forums","name":"What has made the leadership forums feel different for you lately?","description":"Invites her to explain the pullback in a non-accusatory way.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team interaction texture","name":"What part of team interaction has felt harder to stay connected to?","description":"Looks for the specific interaction pattern that may be draining connection.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Scope fit","name":"Where does your current scope feel the best fit right now?","description":"Checks whether the current shape of the role still fits what she is trying to do.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support gap","name":"What support would make the biggest difference for you right now?","description":"Gives her an easy way to name help she has not asked for yet.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Load pressure","name":"What part of your current load feels least sustainable?","description":"Checks whether the workload mix is crowding out attention or recovery.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Priority tradeoff","name":"What are you choosing to deprioritise right now?","description":"Surfaces the tradeoff behind her current focus and what is getting less attention.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Manager help","name":"What would you want me to do differently over the next couple of weeks?","description":"Makes room for concrete manager support without forcing her to frame a diagnosis.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next step focus","name":"Given what we have covered, where do you want to focus first?","description":"Closes by turning the conversation into a near-term choice without opening new threads.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
